Stellaria stellata, also known as starry stellaria, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Stellaria stellata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Stellaria stellata is often prepared as a tea or tincture to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
